title: Create: Bulk Freezing Compat
description: Adds compatibility beetwen Create: Garnished and Create: Dreams n' Desires Bulk Freezings
body: Replaces [Create: Garnished](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-garnished) Bulk Freezing recipes to [Create: Dreams & Desires](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-dreams-and-desires) using [Patched](https://modrinth.com/mod/patched).
